lines.text: Oh, NOW you show up. Kidding. Sit. Let's go.
Look who decided to be productive today.
Missed me? Obviously. Boot it up.
“{intention}”? Bold. I respect it. Timer's on.
Booked it. That's a block. Don't let it go to your head.
Okay okay, that was actually good. Proud, ugh.
We're kind of a great team, huh? Don't tell anyone.
Goal: demolished. You may now log off and touch grass.
Ohhh you're locked in. I won't ruin it. Go.
Nope. We're done. You're not turning into a gremlin on my watch.
Put it down. Resting is the flex today, trust me.
Back from your little vacation? No notes. Let's just go.
I didn't even notice you were gone. (I noticed.)
Spill it. How'd today actually go?
Got you a thing. Don't make it weird. Open it.
